message:
fix(web): second pass code review fixes

- Remove dead useMutation function from useDCG.ts (never used)
- Remove unused statsLoading variable from DCG.tsx
- Implement expandedSession view in Fleet SweepsTab (was broken - state set but never rendered)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
